questionHtml: Determine the internal resistance of the battery.
markschemeHtml:
V dropped across battery OR Rcircuit = 1.85 Ω ✔

so internal resistance = 4.0 6.5 = 0.62«Ω» ✔

For MP1 allow use of internal resistance equations that leads to 16V − 12V (=4V).

Award [2] for a bald correct answer.

meta.title: Determine the internal resistance of the battery.
